Program_Description: WIC Program helps families by providing nutrition education, breastfeeding support, healthy foods, and referrals to health care and other community services.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children up to 5 years of age.
Eligibility_Requirements: Individuals who are pregnant, breastfeeding, or just had a baby in the past 6 months; children up to 5 years of age; meet WIC income guidelines or receive Medi-Cal, CalWORKS or CalFresh benefits.
Application_Process: Call (805) 781-5570 or text (888) 417-6180 to schedule an appointment.
Required_Documentation: Identification for the persons applying for WIC, proof of all family income, proof of street address.

Program_Name: Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children
Program_Description: The WIC program provides nutritional support and education to low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women, as well as infants and children.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
